summary:
\boxed{B}

The agent concludes that there is no evidence linking alpha-CGRP to amyloidogenesis; instead, amyloid-beta peptides are associated with Alzheimer’s pathology through specific enzymatic processing of APP. This indicates a lack of established amyloidogenic properties for αCGRP as per available data.
